title: Cave Sounds Polish
description: Now instead of scary caveman sound will be replaced by polish memes. Although this is even scarier than vanilla.
body:
### Now scary cave sounds will be replaced by funny Polish memes!

 

From funny phrases to amusing sound effects, this resourcepack is designed to add a unique atmosphere!
of humor and joy to your minecraft world. Make your dungeons a lot more fun or even scarier with Cave Sounds Polish! Bring a dose of fun to your game world with the "Meme Caves" resource pack. This unique pack replaces the usual cave sounds with colorful Polish memes and fun sound effects, including the unique "metal pipel" sound effect.

Will replace all 19 sounds with Polish memes and more

 
### resource pack works on all versions!

 

 [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@invisual_) channel

 

The resource pack works on all versions of Minecraft.

Enjoy!
